message:
fix: replace local frankentui path deps with git deps for portable builds

All 9 ftui-* dependencies pointed to /dp/frankentui/crates/* which
only exists on the author's machine. Source builds via cargo install
--git failed on any other machine (including ARM64 CI).

Now uses git dependencies pointing to the frankentui GitHub repo,
which resolves on any machine.

Closes #2

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

 dependencies = [
  "ftui-core",
  "ftui-layout",
